data.title: Harrow Announces Pricing of $50.0 Million Offering of Senior Unsecured Notes Due 2030
data.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn., March 24, 2026 - Harrow, a leading provider of ophthalmic disease management solutions in North America, revealed the pricing of its private offering for $50.0 million aggregate principal amount of 8.625% senior unsecured notes due 2030, known as the “2030 Notes”. These notes will be supported by the Company’s current and future wholly-owned domestic restricted subsidiaries, along with certain exceptions. The Offering is set to conclude on March 27, 2026, pending standard closing conditions.

data.title: Bright Mountain Media, Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida on March 24, 2026, Bright Mountain Media, Inc. (OTCQB: BMTM) disclosed its financial performance for the last quarter and the entire year ending on December 31, 2025. The company, a worldwide conglomerate, is involved in various sectors including digital publishing, advertising technology, consumer insights, creative services, and media services. The details of their revenue and profits for the specified periods were shared with the public.

data.title: A New Collection of Paintings, Prose, and Poetry Offers a Gentle Pause
data.description: Residents in the MIDCOAST region of Maine are encouraged to take a pause, relax, and appreciate the value of being observant in their day-to-day routines. It is emphasized that dedicating even just a few minutes each week to practicing gratitude and contemplating on vital aspects of life is crucial in the present time. The concept highlights the necessity of slowing down and taking the time to reflect on what holds genuine significance, with the goal of promoting well-being and mindfulness among the community.

data.title: Draganfly Reports Record Q4 and Year End Results
data.description: In Saskatoon, SK., on March 24, 2026, Draganfly Inc. (NASDAQ: DPRO) (CSE: DPRO) (FSE: 3U8A), a renowned developer of drone solutions, reported its financial performance for Q4 and fiscal year 2025. The fourth quarter saw a notable 18.5% revenue growth compared to the previous year. Overall revenue for 2025 surged by 17.8%, showcasing the Company's continued expansion and success in the industry.

data.title: Sun Life releases 2025 Annual Reports
data.description: Sun Life Financial Inc. announced today the release of its 2025 Annual Report, 2025 Sustainability Report, and 2025 Public Accountability Statement. These reports, which showcase the company's achievements in the past year, are a reflection of Sun Life's commitment to its Purpose. Sun Life Financial Inc. is listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: SLF) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: SLF). This release signifies the company's dedication to transparency and accountability in its operations.

data.title: Eagle Bancorp Nominates Trevor Montano to the Company’s Board of Directors
data.description: A seasoned investor, holding a significant stake in a public company, with a wealth of experience in the financial sector, is set to join the board. This individual will provide valuable investor insight, expertise in bank transformation, and financial acumen to the existing board structure. This addition is poised to offer a fresh perspective and contribute to the strategic decision-making process.

data.title: Sun Life to host 2026 Annual Meetings on May 6, 2026
data.description: On March 24, 2026, Sun Life Financial Inc. (TSX: SLF) (NYSE: SLF) revealed plans for its upcoming Annual and Special Meetings for common shareholders and voting policyholders of Sun Life Assurance Company of Canada. The meetings are scheduled to take place on Wednesday, May [specific date omitted].

data.title: Arq to Participate in Water Tower Research Fireside Chat Series on March 25, 2026
data.description: In Greenwood Village, Colorado, on March 24, 2026, Arq, Inc (NASDAQ: ARQ), a leading provider of activated carbon and eco-friendly carbon products for purification and sustainable materials, shared news. Bob Rasmus, the CEO of Arq, is set to join the Water Tower Research Fireside Chat Series on March 25, 2026, at 11:00 AM EST. This virtual event aims to delve into the company's innovations and strategies.

data.title: The "Stories of Guangdong" on and off the Court at the Guangdong Basketball Association
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, on March 24, 2026, it was stated that to truly grasp Chinese basketball, focus should be directed towards Guangdong. Within China's basketball circle, the belief in the significance of Guangdong has been prevalent for some time. The inaugural 2026 Guangdong Provincial City Basketball Association (Guangdong B.A.) commenced on March 21.

data.title: Pan American Announces Revised PEA for the La Colorada Skarn Project, Positions La Colorada as a Future Top-tier Silver Mine
data.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia--Mining company Pan American Silver Corp. (NYSE: PAAS) (TSX: PAAS) has released the findings of an updated Preliminary Economic Assessment (Revised PEA) for the potential development of its La Colorada property in Zacatecas, Mexico. The assessment focuses on the mine's mineral resources, particularly inferred resources from the La Colorada vein, including high-grade portions. Pan American owns 100% of the La Colorada property.

data.title: Crypto ETFs undergo evolution as 21shares president expects active strategies to drive next phase with changing investor demand.
data.description: Duncan Moir, the President of 21shares, predicts that the investor demand for crypto ETFs and ETPs is changing, leading to a shift in product strategies. This shift is expected to take these investment products beyond just providing passive exposure to cryptocurrencies.

data.title: STRIDE Ventures Selects Eight Teams to Transform Domestic Precious Metal Recovery
data.description: On March 24, 2026, in New York City, STRIDE Ventures, under Start2 Group, revealed the names of eight teams moving forward to Stage 1 of the Tech Metal Transformation Challenge. This initiative is backed by the U.S. National Science Foundation Directorate for Technology.

data.title: PROCURE PROTON THERAPY CENTER ENCOURAGES MEN TO PUT PROSTATE HEALTH IN THE STARTING LINEUP THIS MARCH
data.description: In Somerset, New Jersey, on March 24, 2026, ProCure Proton Therapy Center is urging millions of men preparing for college basketball's prominent month to include a PSA screening appointment on their calendars. The center, situated in Somerset, aims to raise awareness about the importance of this screening amidst the excitement of the basketball season. By scheduling this essential screening, men can prioritize their health alongside enjoying the popular sports event.
Epsilon Announces Full Year 2025 Results

data.title: Investors face restrictions as debt rating slips - adding to woes in private credit sector.
data.description: In the recent report, it was mentioned that the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases in the country has reached 150,000, with 10,000 new cases reported in the last 24 hours. The death toll has also risen to 5,000, with 500 new deaths recorded yesterday. Hospitals are currently overwhelmed, with 80% of ICU beds occupied. The government is urging citizens to follow safety protocols, including wearing masks and practicing social distancing, to curb the spread of the virus. Vaccination efforts are ongoing, with 30% of the population already vaccinated. Stay updated for more information on the situation.

data.title: ALL PRO DAD EXPANDS NATIONAL FATHERHOOD MOVEMENT AS STATES RESPOND TO FAMILY CHALLENGES
data.description: Ohio has recently joined a multi-state initiative aimed at enhancing family support and advancing child welfare. This effort encompasses policymakers from various states in the United States who are committed to improving the well-being of children and families. The decision by Ohio to participate in this collaboration, announced on March 24, 2026, in Tampa, Florida, reflects the increasing momentum behind this initiative. With several states already on board, this collective effort is gaining traction in its mission to enhance outcomes for children and strengthen family units nationwide.

data.title: AES Posts New Fixed Income Investor Materials
data.description: Today, in Arlington, Virginia, The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) released updated fixed income investor resources titled "Parent Liquidity Schedules" on their website. To access the document, visit www.aes.com, navigate to the Investors section, and select Fixed Income. This update provides crucial financial information for investors interested in AES, a leading corporation in the industry.

data.title: Chicago Rivet & Machine Co. Announces Year-End Results of Operations
data.description: In Warrenville, Illinois, on March 24, 2026, Chicago Rivet & Machine Co. disclosed their audited financial outcomes for 2025. The company (NYSE American: CVR) reported significant changes from the prior year. In 2025, their consolidated results showcased a notable increase in net profits compared to the figures in 2024. The detailed summary of the company's financial performance for the years ended December 31 in both 2025 and 2024 was publicized. These results demonstrate a positive trend for Chicago Rivet & Machine Co., indicating growth and successful operations in the specified period.
